actual_backend: Steel Browser cloud session via Steel CLI 0.4.4 + Playwright over Steel CDP
recording_source: Steel automatic session recording HLS endpoint /v1/sessions/{session_id}/hls
coverage: TC-01 through TC-13 executed in order against the dummy fake-data Grist document. Screenshots show widget row counts/chips plus linked target widgets and unlinked control. JSON evidence reports overall_pass=true.
notes: Steel CLI 0.4.4 does not expose a steel browser record command.
The recording was exported from Steel automatic HLS recording and converted to MP4 with ffmpeg.
No existing Grist document was touched; only the dummy validation document was used.
